repair_history.diagnosis:
line 65: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex is incorrectly referencing component implementation as a value in an assumption -> Replace Q.Impl = Q.Impl with true
line 66: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex incorrectly references implementation in data routing guarantee -> Replace Data_Sink -> Q.Impl with Data_Sink -> Data_Sink
line 67: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex incorrectly references implementation property 'period' -> Replace Q.Impl.period = 10 with true
line 68: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex incorrectly references implementation property 'deadline' -> Replace Q.Impl.deadline = 10 with true
line 69: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Impl'.: AGREE annex incorrectly references implementation property 'priority' -> Replace Q.Impl.priority = 1 with true

line 66: Expression for guarantee statement is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': The expression Data_Sink -> Data_Sink is invalid because it references the same port on both sides of the arrow, which is not a valid AGREE expression -> Replace Data_Sink -> Data_Sink with true

Source_Data_Size (property association) does not point to anything: undefined property reference in annex -> remove or define Source_Data_Size property association
